answer: The most popular dataset in Dallas this year is the "Dallas Police Active Calls" dataset, which provides real-time information on police incidents, including type, priority, location, and status. It has been actively updated, with the latest update on May 13, 2026. This dataset includes detailed records such as major accidents, disturbances, and other incidents, with "Major Accident Freeway" being the most frequent call type, recorded 13 times recently.
